violations.text: Glass dome cover observed in poor repair (glass observed cracked on bottom). Cover was taken out of service during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The floors in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025
Interior of 2 door reach-in coolers were observed with rust marks. Equipment to be properly adjusted/refurbished/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
